message:
Merge pull request #3 from clubanderson/ci/add-shared-reusable-workflows

🐛 Fix hadolint files regex in pre-commit template

files.patch:
@@ -38,7 +38,7 @@ repos:
         language: system
         entry: hadolint
         args: [--failure-threshold, error]
-        files: Dockerfile.*
+        files: Dockerfile(\\..*)?$
         types: [file]
 
   # Markdown linting
